Class InjectionWellModel.InjectionZoneResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.reservoir.InjectionWellModel.InjectionZoneResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
InjectionWellModel
public static class InjectionWellModel.InjectionZoneResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result for a single injection zone.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
